hooks.command:
node -e "const {execSync}=require('child_process');const now=new Date().toLocaleString('id-ID',{timeZone:'Asia/Jakarta',dateStyle:'full',timeStyle:'medium'});let branch='(bukan git repo)';try{branch=execSync('git branch --show-current',{encoding:'utf8'}).trim()||'(detached HEAD)'}catch(e){}let files='(tidak ada)';try{files=execSync('git log --diff-filter=M --name-only --format= -n 10',{encoding:'utf8'}).trim().split('
').filter(Boolean).slice(0,3).map((f,i)=>(i+1)+'. '+f).join('
')}catch(e){}console.log('
=== INFO SESI CLAUDE CODE ===');console.log('Tanggal & Waktu : '+now);console.log('Branch Git      : '+branch);console.log('3 File Terbaru  :
'+files);console.log('============================
')"
